name: Stickdoll 2 : Revenge Of Flame
description: The sequel to stickdoll God Of Archery, this game is about the Fire Kingdom's desire to regain its power with Flame. Flame is planning to collect 5 elemental stones and kneel everyone.Combining the main element stone and other stones on the black magic book will now be invincible. But in this adventure, Gargle betrays him and steals the main element stone, and he goes after the 5 element stones. This is how the adventure begins. In each episode, the guardians of the kingdoms, the guardians of the stones, and challenging platforms await Flame.
instructions: Use Space to attack Use the Arrow Keys to jump and move
